data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'Post-completion certificate', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this feature, leading to a clear gap in meeting the requirement. The absence of any API endpoints or persisted state checks related to the post-completion certificate indicates that this requirement is not covered.
gaps: No evidence of a post-completion certificate feature.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for post-completion certificate
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete API endpoints and assertions that verify the existence and functionality of the post-completion certificate.
